summary: Re-test of P0 fixes from iteration_66. PASS overall. (1) Free-trial Book Now → slot-picker dialog opens directly (no longer routed to legacy 'Coaching Access Required' modal). (2) Mentor cards have NO blur (filter='none', no .blur-sm children) for free_trial. (3) Admin /admin?section=discovery-calls renders discovery-source-filter dropdown + 14 purple cohort badges; filter toggle works (Cohort→14 rows, Coaching→0 cohort rows). (4) Backend regression pytest 8/8 PASS. (5) Code review confirms pay-direct-radio + pay-with-credit-radio JSX is correct. NOTE: End-to-end UI flow through to the radio block could NOT be exercised live because ALL 26 mentors in the dev DB show 'No availability found' — this is a seed-data limitation, not a code regression. Code-level verification of the radio logic was performed at CoachingPage.jsx lines 2660-2715.

integration_issues.issue: All 26 mentors in the dev DB return 'No availability found' for both free_trial and full_prep users. This blocks live UI verification of the date+slot+session-type → radio block flow. Code-level review confirms the JSX is correct, but a seed should be added so future testers can E2E-verify the booking → payment radio path.

issues: Direct nav to /admin?section=discovery-calls does not auto-select Discovery Calls section on first load — required a manual sidebar click to render the section. Minor (test workaround applied).

action_items: (Optional) Add seed availability for at least one mentor in dev so future testing agents can run an end-to-end live booking flow that reaches pay-direct-radio + pay-with-credit-radio.
(Optional) Make AdminPage respect ?section=<id> URL param on first load (currently requires sidebar click).
critical_code_review_comments: CoachingPage.jsx 2497: legacy `!hasCoaching` branch correctly retained as admin-override gate; the previously broken `!hasCoachingProgram` gate has been removed — verified.
CoachingPage.jsx 2665: `pay-with-credit-radio` correctly conditioned on `sessionsRemaining > 0 || isUnlimitedCoaching` — free_trial users will only see `pay-direct-radio`.
CoachingPage.jsx 2687: `pay-direct-radio` `checked={payDirect || (sessionsRemaining === 0 && !isUnlimitedCoaching)}` correctly auto-selects for free_trial without any user interaction.
CoachingPage.jsx 2711: confirm button label correctly switches to `Pay ₹X & Book` when payDirect is on or user has 0 credits.
DiscoveryCallsSection.jsx: discovery-source-filter dropdown + cohort badges render and filter correctly — verified end-to-end in admin UI.
Backend GET /api/admin/discovery-calls/bookings still merges cohort_discovery_calls and exposes source/cohort_name/cohort_slug/scheduled_datetime_display — 8/8 pytest pass.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of P0 items verifiable (free-trial gate removed, no blur, admin UI fully working). Pay-radio E2E verified via code review only due to mentor seed-data gap.

test_credentials: POST /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin / free_trial / subscription. Same credentials as iteration_66.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features for this iteration are working. The single gap is mentor availability seed data — every mentor returns 'No availability', so any test trying to pick a date+slot in the booking dialog will hit a dead end. If you need to verify the radio block live in the browser, first POST mentor availability for at least one mentor (e.g., POST /api/mentors/{id}/availability with a future date+slot) or seed via DB. The booking dialog itself opens correctly for both free_trial (0 credits) and full_prep — that fix is verified. Admin discovery-calls section needs a sidebar click after navigation; ?section= URL param isn't auto-honored on first load.
rca of the issue: No issue this iteration. Iteration_66's reported CRITICAL bug (free-trial Book Now showing 'Coaching Access Required' modal) is FIXED — verified by direct UI test: clicking [data-testid=book-now-mentor-mentor-abhishek] as free_trial opens 'Book Session with Abhishek Hiteshi' slot-picker dialog (no Coaching Access Required text, no Unlock Coaching text). Code root cause was the `!hasCoachingProgram` ternary branch inside the booking dialog at CoachingPage.jsx ~line 2463 which has now been removed.
